_note: HUNT PROBE — the game-pitch claim as an engine fact: a hunted species goes EXTINCT and STAYS extinct (nothing respawns from nothing), while the same world without the hunter keeps a living, cycling herd. One glade, one herd of grazers with real demography (births cost food and inherit stats; old age culls; crowding caps the herd), and one optional hunter whose count reads the glade's `hunters` stat — so the A/B is one number in the seed. The hunter fells the FATTEST grazer each strike (@max pick), which also removes the best breeders: extinction pressure compounds systemically, not by script. This is the seed of the fauna layer: catch/document/overhunt all build on these exact prims.

events.label: the glade falls silent — the grazers are gone
